summary: Removed the temporary Command Center test marker from the holding page footer.
The deleted line read: Command Center live test 2 — safe to remove.
One file touched (Site/holding-page/index.html): the footer div and the .test-marker CSS rule, plus both TEMPORARY comments.
Verified no leftover references remain and the page's HTML still parses with no unclosed or mismatched tags.
Opened PR #16 and stopped at 'PR ready' — no merge, no deploy, nothing outside this repo.
notes: This run is the exact reverse of cc-b29ab862, which added the marker; the footer is now byte-identical to its state before that change. Removed the .test-marker CSS rule as well as the markup, since no other element used that class and leaving it would be dead styling — if the intent was to keep the rule for future test markers, that one hunk can be dropped from the PR. Filename follows the flat cc-<id>.json form the task specified, matching the precedent of results/cc-b29ab862.json, rather than the <task-id>.<run-id>.json pattern in results/README.md. No blockers.
